text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're past the fourth corner and heading into
the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (This is it! Now's the time for me to—)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(My legs feel... heavy... But now is when I need to
make my move!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand it's over! Satono Diamond takes the gold!
The storm has cleared, and the sun has revealed a
brilliantly shining diamond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Nice job, Satono Diamond!
It's obvious she's just getting started! I can't wait
to see how she grows!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she looked a little shaky near the end, but
it was a great performance nonetheless!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something felt off about her performance during
the race. Satono Diamond was clearly feeling
tired near the end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have spent too much energy running to
the racecourse earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it she hadn't done that, she wouldn't have
made it in time for the race. Our hands were tied,
but still...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(It took everything I had just to run all 2,000
meters of that race... I'm sure everyone was able
to see that...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(The last section was so difficult to get through. I
wasn't able to sprint properly on the final stretch
at all...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (That was a far cry from how I wanted to run...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(The Satsuki Sho is a race where only the fastest
prevail, and that performance was hardly one
befitting its victor!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I can hardly call myself illustrious after that!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list: Sorry for making you run here.
Sorry for making you run here.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?! There's no need for you to apologize!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I thought getting out of the taxi and running was
the best decision as well!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm just upset the rotten weather prevented me
from running at my very best...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I wonder if this was also due to the Satono jinx...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But even if it was...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I just need to break it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Japanese Derby! I'll destroy the
jinx there, pull off a perfect performance, and
take first place for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's declaration rings with
determination. This spate of misfortune appears
to have strengthened her resolve to break the
jinx.
